title: Bridge Essay: Working Memory Ability Evaluation Based on Fuzzy Support Vector Regression.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Formless/Absorption** (Phase 8) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Formless/Absorption to mechanistic neuroscience.

**Working Memory Ability Evaluation Based on Fuzzy Support Vector Regression.** — Sensors (Basel). PMID: 37837076. DOI: 10.3390/s23198246. One'sworking memory process is afundamental cognitive activity which often serves as an indicator of brain disease and cognitive impairment. In this research, the approach to evaluate working memory ability by means of electroencephalography (EEG) analysis was proposed. The result shows that the EEG signals of subjects share some characteristics when performing working memory tasks.
